observations: rlm_stats is fastest (563ms) - good for quick project info
rlm_search is efficient (738ms) - pattern matching well optimized
rlm_ask has moderate latency (898ms) - semantic search overhead
rlm_recall is slowest (4441ms) - memory vector search needs optimization
rlm_sections returns most data (299KB) - consider pagination
recommendations: Investigate rlm_recall latency - vector DB query optimization needed
All tools succeed - API stability is good
